rationale: The user explicitly requested DARK ONLY mode and referenced a 'deep dark navy theme'. We will use Archetype 4 for authoritative, functional data-heavy views mixed with Archetype 5's depth for marketing, completely avoiding any prohibited teal/cyan/purple. Deep midnight blue paired with Royal Blue accents communicates elite financial trust and precision.

headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tighter) for all headings above 32px. Use font-black for hero text. NEVER use Inter for headings.

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, labels, and table data. tracking-normal to tracking-wide for tiny uppercase overlines.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-black text-white
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight text-white
scale.label: text-sm font-semibold tracking-wider uppercase text-blue-400

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-12) for marketing cards, tight dense spacing for the Admin Dashboard.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: MODE A: TETRIS GRID. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Mix col-span-4 and col-span-8 for asymmetry. Never fill 100% perfectly; leave negative space.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: MODE B: CONTROL ROOM. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Every pixel utilized. h-full on children.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Always left-align paragraphs, inputs, and dense content. Center alignment is only permitted for the main Hero heading if it serves visual tension.

surfaces.cards_marketing: Glassmorphism: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl. Internal padding must be generous (p-8).
surfaces.cards_dashboard: Solid: bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg. No massive shadows, keep it functional.
surfaces.header: Crystal Glass: bg-[#030712]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 sticky top-0 z-50.
surfaces.footer: Deep dark slate bg-slate-950 border-t border-slate-800 py-24.

animations.hover: Translate Y up (-translate-y-1), increase border opacity (border-white/20), and subtle primary color glow.
animations.page_load: Framer motion staggered fade-up for list items (Compliance breakdown, Features).
animations.score_ring: Use pure SVG with stroke-dashoffset or Recharts to animate the compliance score ring filling up over 1.5s.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5. Dynamic coloring: use text-blue-500 for active states, text-slate-400 for neutral.

media.logo_strategy: Render text logos using [Entity Name] instead of images for a cleaner, resolution-independent look. DO NOT use placeholder images.

components_instructions.landing_page: Full dark mode. Overlay hero_background with bg-slate-950/80 to ensure text contrast. Build the 6-feature grid and 7 Business Types cards using the Tetris bento pattern. Use Shadcn accordions for FAQ.
components_instructions.audit_page: Do NOT use an external image for the score ring. Build a pure SVG or Recharts radial bar that animates from 0 to the calculated score. Color-code the score: Emerald (>80), Warning (50-80), Danger (<50). Use Shadcn progress bars for the category breakdown. Use Tabs for Failed/Passed/All.
components_instructions.plans_page: Use 3 pricing cards. Highlight the 'Professional' tier with a glowing tracing border effect (border-blue-500/50). Use Shadcn Dialog for the Enterprise 'Contact Us' form.
components_instructions.onboarding_wizard: Build a custom 5-step horizontal progress bar. Use Shadcn Forms for validation. The business type toggles should be large, clickable cards using radio group logic.
components_instructions.dashboard: Use a strict 4-column Control Room grid. Avoid heavy glassmorphism here; use solid bg-slate-900. Use Shadcn Tables for the Submissions list, with an action dropdown for status changes.
components_instructions.admin_login: Centered card with clean email/password inputs. No massive background images here, keep it focused.
components_instructions.buttons: Primary CTA: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-bold rounded-lg px-6 py-3 transition-colors. NEVER use teal/purple.

testing.attributes: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements, e.g., data-testid='audit-scan-button', data-testid='pricing-starter-plan', data-testid='login-submit'.
